description.ko: 디지털 정원에서 피어난 광섬유맥과 미세 회로를 가진 사이버네틱 난초를 통해 자연과 기술의 융합을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A fusion of nature and technology, featuring a cybernetic orchid with fiber-optic veins and micro-circuitry blooming in a digital garden.

prompt: A hyper-realistic cinematic 3D render of FLORA-9, titled 'The Circuitry Blossom.' A futuristic botanical entity with translucent #FFB6C1 pale pink petals embedded with #50C878 emerald micro-circuitry. Glowing #89CFF0 cyan fiber-optic veins pulse rhythmically within the leaves, rooted in #4A0E4E deep plum data-soil composed of silicon shards. Shimmering digital pollen floats like glowing pixels in an ethereal atmosphere. Macro photography focus, Unreal Engine 5 style, 8k resolution, showcasing the divine merger of organic life and technological hardware.
